final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing marketing poster (WeChat article cover) for a fragrance brand new-product launch titled "染秋 - 秋意染染 时光留香".

Style/medium: high-end editorial flat design, luxury fragrance campaign aesthetic in the spirit of Hermès or Jo Malone seasonal print ads, refined and restrained
Composition: centered composition, headline text as the dominant focal element, symmetrical balance with generous negative space framing the center
Subject: fragrance product launch visual for "染秋", headline "染秋 - 秋意染染 时光留香" as the hero typographic element, supported by subtle autumnal decorative motifs (fallen leaves, amber mist, or ink-wash texture)
Scene/backdrop: abstract autumnal atmosphere — warm amber and deep ochre gradient wash, soft bokeh or ink-diffusion background suggesting late-autumn light
Lighting/mood: soft diffused golden-hour warmth, low contrast, serene and nostalgic mood evoking the slow passage of time
Color palette: deep amber and burnt sienna as dominant tones, ivory or champagne white for text contrast, muted sage or dusty rose as a secondary accent
Materials/textures: subtle paper grain or silk-weave texture overlay, delicate ink-wash brushstroke details
Text (verbatim): "染秋 - 秋意染染 时光留香"
Constraints: headline must be the largest and most legible element; layout must fit a 900×500 horizontal banner format; text must remain crisp and unobscured by background elements
Avoid: cluttered composition, overly saturated colors, generic stock-photo autumn leaves, drop shadows that cheapen the luxury feel, watermarks, 8K stuffer aesthetic
